entry: Log entry: We won 68% of the last 24h of closed trades, and the drop×bounce lab found a -1.881%/trade edge at drop 6.0%→target 5.0%. Slow is smooth, smooth is fast. Another honest cycle in the books.
good_signals: we won 68% of the last 24h of closed trades
the drop×bounce lab found a -1.881%/trade edge at drop 6.0%→target 5.0%
regime classification is live on 4 book(s) so we can read the tape before betting
what: A human-voice daily log that surfaces something genuinely good each run.
note: Composed only from true state — never invents wins.
